title: Homeland Security
description: Learn about how to become a citizen, prepare for natural disasters, international adoption, cyber security, jobs at DHS, FOIA requests, providing feedback.
text:
Check Immigration Case Status
Check the status of your case if you have applied or petitioned for an immigration benefit.
Get a Green Card
Steps to apply for a green card, and eligibility requirements.
Verify Employment Eligibility (E-Verify)
Learn how to confirm employee eligibility to work in the U.S.
Report Suspicious Activity
Explore options for reporting suspicious activity.
Move to the United States
Learn procedures for establishing citizenship and applying for a visa.
Adopt a Child Internationally
Learn the process of adopting a child internationally.
Become a U.S. Citizen
Learn how to become a U.S. citizen, by birth or through naturalization.
Check the National Terrorism Advisory System (NTAS)
Check NTAS alerts for terrorist threat information.
Use the Coronavirus Calculators
Tools to estimate COVID-19 surface and airborne decay.
Get a Homeland Security Job
Explore career opportunities at DHS.
Prepare My Family for a Disaster
Tips to prepare your family for a disaster.
Submit a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) Request
Learn how to submit a FOIA Request.
File a Civil Rights Complaint
Instructions for filing a civil rights and civil liberties complaint.
Find Flood Maps and Insurance
Learn about flood maps and the National Flood Insurance Program.
Find Citizenship Resources
Find resources about U.S. citizenship and immigration services.
Find Law Enforcement Resources
Browse resources available for law enforcement, including training and grant opportunities.
